name: Old-Fashioned Cornbread Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch square pan and a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set them aside.
3. To prepare cornbread, combine cornmeal, baking powder, egg whites, and buttermilk in a mixing bowl. Spread batter evenly into the prepared 9-inch pan.
4. Bake for 20 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F.
5. Remove cornbread from the pan and crumble into a mixing bowl.
6. Add onions, celery, sage, poultry seasoning, black pepper, chicken broth, and egg whites to the crumbled cornbread.
7. Loosely spoon stuffing into the dish.
8. Bake for 45 minutes.
